hero.title: Professional Renovation and Finishing Services in Moscow
hero.subtitle: SAELACONS delivers premium renovation services for apartments, cafes, retail spaces, and commercial properties. Quality materials, expert team, on-time delivery.

home.servicesSubtitle: Turnkey renovation solutions for apartments, cafes, and commercial spaces
home.projectsSubtitle: Examples of our renovation work across Moscow

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: SAELACONS — Your Trusted Renovation Partner in Moscow
about.description: LLC «SAELA» (SAELACONS) is a professional renovation company based in Moscow, specializing in apartment, cafe, restaurant, and commercial space renovations. With our experienced team of craftsmen and commitment to quality materials, we transform living and working spaces into the places you've always envisioned. We stand out through our meticulous attention to detail and client-first approach in every project.
about.missionText: To transform every space into the comfort and aesthetic its owner dreams of. To deliver quality renovations on budget and on time, without compromise.
about.visionText: To become Moscow's most trusted and preferred renovation company, representing the quality of Turkish craftsmanship in Russia.

valuesList.qualityText: We pursue excellence in every detail. Our finishing work sets us apart.
valuesList.trustText: We deliver on the promised date, at the promised quality.
valuesList.innovationText: We work with current design trends and premium materials.
valuesList.sustainabilityText: No hidden costs. Clear pricing from the start, no surprises.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: From apartments to cafes, retail to restaurants — professional renovation for every space

apartmentRenovation.title: Apartment Renovation
apartmentRenovation.description: Complete or partial renovation from studios to large apartments. Walls, floors, ceilings, painting, plastering, and all finishing work included.

commercialRenovation.title: Commercial Space Renovation
commercialRenovation.description: Store, office, and mall interior renovations. We create modern, functional spaces that impress your customers.

cafeRestaurant.title: Cafe & Restaurant Renovation
cafeRestaurant.description: Atmosphere-creating interior design and implementation. Turnkey cafe and restaurant renovation including kitchen areas.

finishingWork.title: Finishing Work
finishingWork.description: Painting, drywall, ceramic tiles, parquet, wallpaper, and decorative coatings. Flawless results with a detail-oriented approach.

bathroomKitchen.title: Bathroom & Kitchen Renovation
bathroomKitchen.description: Full bathroom and kitchen remodeling. Plumbing, tiling, cabinet installation, and all details included.

designPlanning.title: Design & Planning
designPlanning.description: Free on-site assessment and project planning for your space. We offer design recommendations tailored to your needs.

projects.title: Our Projects
projects.subtitle: Examples of our completed renovation projects

project1.title: 3-Bedroom Apartment Renovation
project1.description: Complete renovation of an 85 m² apartment: flooring, wall painting, bathroom and kitchen remodeling, lighting and electrical work.

project2.title: Boutique Cafe Interior Design
project2.description: Full interior creation for a 120 m² cafe space. Industrial-modern style with custom lighting and furniture layout.

project3.title: Mall Retail Space Renovation
project3.description: Modern store concept for a 200 m² retail space. Storefront design, flooring, ceiling work, and lighting system.

project4.title: Studio Apartment Modernization
project4.description: Complete renovation of a 42 m² studio with smart space utilization. Minimalist design with integrated storage solutions.

project5.title: Restaurant Renovation Project
project5.description: Complete renovation of a 180 m² restaurant space including kitchen area, with a modern Russian-Turkish fusion concept.

project6.title: Modern Office Renovation
project6.description: Modern workspace creation in a 150 m² office space. Open plan layout, meeting rooms, and break area.

contact.subtitle: Reach out for a free assessment and price quote
